violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani spray found with less than 150ppm Quat solution and mixed with soap. *Maintain sanitizer spray at 200-400ppm Quat diluted with water only.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hands sink was not set up for use in mobile unit.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -No hand soap available in unit.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -No hand wash station set-up. *Walking taco assembly done on-site requires hand wash station.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Taco meat found at 99F. (In roaster plugged into a table top generator.)
